info.title: Free password generator for secure logins
info.description: Create a strong password online for email, banking, work accounts, Wi-Fi, and social media. Every password is generated locally in your browser, so nothing is sent to a server.
info.howToTitle: How to create a password online

howToList.step1: Choose the password length and the character types you want to use
howToList.step2: Optionally exclude similar or unwanted characters
howToList.step3: Generate a password instantly and copy it with one click

info.whereTitle: What this password generator is good for

whereList.mail: Email, social media, and messaging accounts
whereList.wifi: Wi-Fi passwords, routers, and smart devices
whereList.work: Work accounts, dashboards, admin panels, and team tools

recommendationsList.banking: For banking and financial services, use 16+ characters with uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols
recommendationsList.email: For email and social accounts, use at least 12 characters with mixed character types
recommendationsList.wifi: For Wi-Fi passwords, use longer passwords and exclude similar characters if you need to type them manually
recommendationsList.games: For gaming, forums, and low-risk sites, 10+ characters is a practical minimum

securityTipsList.unique: Use a unique password for each site
securityTipsList.noPersonal: Don't use your name, birth date, or other personal information
securityTipsList.manager: Store passwords in a password manager
securityTipsList.change: Regularly update important passwords every 3–6 months

faqList.q1: How do I create a strong password online?
faqList.a1: Use at least 12-16 characters, enable uppercase and lowercase letters, numbers, and symbols, then generate a password instantly.
faqList.q2: Is this password generator free to use?
faqList.a2: Yes. You can generate passwords online for free with no registration.
faqList.q3: Is it safe to generate passwords here?
faqList.a3: Yes. Passwords are created locally in your browser and are not sent to a server.
faqList.a4: For most accounts, 12-16 characters is a strong baseline. For sensitive accounts, longer is better.
faqList.q5: What is the xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx format for?
faqList.a5: This format groups your password into blocks of 4 characters separated by dashes, like aaaa-bbbb-cccc-dddd. It makes the password much easier to read, compare, and type by hand — especially useful when you need to write it down, enter it on a device without copy-paste, or read it over the phone.

info.formatDescription: The grouped format makes passwords easier to read and transcribe by hand. It's useful when you need to type the password manually, write it down, or read it over the phone. Each group of 4 characters is clearly separated, reducing mistakes when copying.

formatScenarios.handTyping: Typing on a device without keyboard — smart TV, game console, or ATM
formatScenarios.writing: Writing the password down on paper
formatScenarios.reading: Reading it aloud over a call or video
formatScenarios.comparing: Comparing two passwords character by character to verify they match

info.dictationDescription: Voice dictation helps you manually enter a generated password on another device or in an app where copy and paste is not convenient. Click "Dictate", and the browser will read the password in small character groups, making long passwords easier to type by hand.

dictationScenarios.anotherDevice: Entering a password on another phone, tablet, or computer
dictationScenarios.deviceSetup: Setting up Wi-Fi, a router, a TV, a console, or another device
dictationScenarios.noPaste: Creating a password for an app that does not allow paste from clipboard
dictationScenarios.mobileApp: Moving a password from a browser to a mobile app
dictationScenarios.manualTyping: Typing a complex password manually without writing it down
dictationScenarios.doubleCheck: Double-checking a generated password before saving it

dictationHowSteps.step1: Choose the password length and character types
dictationHowSteps.step5: Type the password manually while listening to the character groups
dictationHowSteps.step6: Click "Stop" to interrupt the voice playback

info.dictationSecurityText: Use voice dictation only where nobody else can hear the password. Dictation is designed for convenient manual entry, but the password is still sensitive information. Avoid using it in public places, during screen sharing, or near other people.
info.dictationPrivacyText: The password is generated in the browser. Dictation uses the browser and device speech features. QSEN does not send the password to its server or to external TTS APIs for voice playback.

dictationFaqList.q1: What is voice password dictation for?
dictationFaqList.a1: It helps you manually type a generated password on another device or in an app where copy and paste is inconvenient. The password is read in small character groups.
dictationFaqList.a2: It is safe when used in a private place. Do not use voice playback near other people, because the password will be spoken aloud.
dictationFaqList.a3: No. Formatting dashes are used only for visual display. Dictation reads the original password characters in small groups.
dictationFaqList.q4: Can I stop the voice playback?
dictationFaqList.a4: Yes. While dictation is active, the button changes to "Stop", and you can interrupt playback at any time.

vatCalculator.title: Free VAT Calculator Online
vatCalculator.subtitle: Add VAT, remove VAT, or calculate tax in seconds

info.title: Free VAT calculator for prices, invoices, and quotes
info.description: Use this online VAT calculator to add VAT to a net price, remove VAT from a gross amount, or calculate the tax portion separately. It works well for quotes, invoices, bookkeeping, and everyday pricing checks.
info.subtitle: A practical VAT tool for accountants, freelancers, ecommerce sellers, agencies, and anyone who needs a quick tax calculation without spreadsheets.

featuresList.addVat: Add VAT to a net amount instantly
featuresList.extractVat: Extract VAT from a gross amount
featuresList.realtime: Get updated results as soon as values change
featuresList.accurate: Work with fast, clear, and accurate totals

info.howToTitle: How to use the VAT calculator

howToList.step1: Choose calculation type: add VAT, remove VAT, or calculate tax
howToList.step4: Get instant results including net price, gross price, and VAT amount

info.addExample: Add VAT: if your net price is 10,000 and the VAT rate is 20%, the total becomes 12,000 and VAT is 2,000.
info.removeExample: Remove VAT: if 12,000 already includes 20% VAT, the calculator shows a net amount of 10,000 and VAT of 2,000.
info.calculateExample: Calculate VAT only: for 10,000 at 20%, the tax amount is 2,000.
info.whereTitle: Where this VAT calculator is useful

whereList.docs: Invoices, quotes, proposals, and billing documents
whereList.sales: Product pricing, ecommerce listings, and service pricing

faqList.q1: How do I remove VAT from a total amount?
faqList.a1: Choose the remove VAT option, enter the total amount, and the calculator will show the net amount and the VAT portion.
faqList.q2: How do I add VAT to a price?
faqList.a2: Choose add VAT, enter the base amount, and the calculator will instantly show the price including tax.
faqList.q3: Which VAT rates does this tool support?
faqList.a3: The calculator supports 5%, 10%, 18%, 19%, 20%, and 22% VAT rates.
faqList.q4: Can I use this VAT calculator for invoices and quotes?
faqList.a4: Yes. It is designed for quick pricing checks, invoices, proposals, and day-to-day bookkeeping tasks.

info.currencySupportDesc: Write amounts in words for USD, EUR, RUB, CNY, KZT, UAH, BYN, UZS, and other supported formats. That makes the tool practical for both local and cross-border paperwork.
info.taxSupportDesc: You can also include VAT or income tax logic in the final amount before converting it into words. This is helpful for billing, financial records, and document preparation.

faqList.q1: How do I convert a number into words online?

faqList.a4: Yes. You can choose VAT or tax-related options and convert the adjusted total into words.

compoundInterest.title: Compound Interest Calculator
compoundInterest.subtitle: Estimate savings, investment growth, and recurring contributions online
compoundInterest.chartNote: This is how compounding and recurring contributions can grow a balance over time
compoundInterest.infoTitle: A simple way to model long-term growth
compoundInterest.infoDescription: Use this compound interest calculator to estimate how savings, investments, or deposits can grow over time. Enter a starting amount, annual rate, time period, and optional monthly contribution to see both future value and total interest earned.

features.futureValue: Future value based on different compounding frequencies
features.contributions: Monthly contribution support for ongoing savings plans
features.chart: A simple chart showing capital growth over time
features.breakdown: A breakdown of deposits versus earned interest
features.compare: A fast way to compare saving and investing scenarios

formulaItems.r: r — annual interest rate (in decimal form)
formulaItems.n: n — number of interest postings per year

compoundInterest.longTermText: Check how a lump sum can grow over years with annual, monthly, or daily compounding.
compoundInterest.recurringText: Add a recurring contribution to see how steady deposits change the final balance over time.
compoundInterest.compareText: Compare interest rates, time periods, and compounding frequency before choosing a savings or investment option.

faq.q1: How do I calculate compound interest online?
faq.a1: Enter your starting amount, annual rate, time period, and compounding frequency. The calculator will show the projected future value and interest earned.
faq.a2: Yes. Add a monthly contribution to estimate how recurring deposits affect long-term growth.
faq.q3: Is this useful for savings and investments?
faq.a3: Yes. It works well for savings goals, investment forecasts, deposits, and other long-term planning scenarios.
faq.q4: What is the difference between simple and compound interest?
faq.a4: Compound interest grows on both the original amount and previously earned interest, while simple interest grows only on the original amount.

faqList.a3: No. You can create and download QR codes instantly without signing up.
faqList.q4: Does it support Cyrillic and mixed text?
faqList.a4: Yes. The generator encodes Unicode/UTF-8 directly, so Cyrillic, Latin text, numbers, and symbols work without transliteration.

urlShortener.title: Free URL Shortener
urlShortener.subtitle: Shorten long links online in seconds with no registration
urlShortener.errorFailed: Failed to shorten link. Check your internet connection.
urlShortener.infoTitle: Free URL shortener for cleaner, shareable links
urlShortener.infoDescription: This online URL shortener helps you turn long links into short, easy-to-share URLs. It is useful for social media, email, SMS, messaging apps, QR codes, and printed marketing materials.

featuresList.history: Keeps a local history of your latest shortened links

urlShortener.howToTitle: How to use the URL shortener

howToList.step1: Paste your long URL into the input field

urlShortener.whereSocialDesc: Perfect for VK, Odnoklassniki, and other platforms. Short links look cleaner and take less space.
urlShortener.whereSmsDesc: Save character space and improve message readability.
urlShortener.wherePrintDesc: Great for business cards, flyers, and banners — easy to remember and type manually.

faqList.q1: How do I shorten a URL online?
faqList.a1: Paste the long URL into the field, click the shorten button, and the tool will return a short link you can copy and share.
faqList.q2: Is this URL shortener free to use?
faqList.a2: Yes. You can shorten links online for free without creating an account.
faqList.q3: What are short links useful for?
faqList.a3: Short links are easier to share in social posts, messages, emails, QR codes, and printed materials.
faqList.q4: Can I shorten any valid URL?
faqList.a4: Yes. If the URL is valid and starts with http:// or https://, the tool can process it.

metaTagsGenerator.infoTitle: Build SEO meta tags for any page in minutes
metaTagsGenerator.infoDescription: Use this meta tags generator to create clean, ready-to-copy title tags, meta descriptions, Open Graph tags, and Twitter cards. It is a quick way to draft metadata for landing pages, articles, product pages, and tool pages.

basicItems.titles: Title tags for search results and browser tabs
basicItems.descriptions: Meta descriptions for clearer search snippets
basicItems.keywords: Keyword fields for projects that still use them
basicItems.robots: Robots directives for basic crawl instructions

metaTagsGenerator.twitterDescription: Twitter card tags help links look cleaner on X/Twitter and in tools that support Twitter metadata.

tips.unique: Use unique metadata for each page instead of one site-wide template
tips.keyword: Place the main keyword early in the title when it fits naturally
tips.description: Write descriptions that explain value and encourage clicks
tips.length: Keep titles and descriptions within clean, readable lengths
tips.social: Add social metadata when the page will be shared in chat or social apps

faq.q1: How do I create meta tags for a page?
faq.a1: Fill in the title, description, and other fields, then copy the generated code into the head section of your page.
faq.q2: What is the ideal title tag length?
faq.a2: A common best practice is about 50-60 characters, depending on the query and page intent.
faq.q3: Why do I need Open Graph tags?
faq.a3: Open Graph tags improve how a page looks when it is shared in messaging apps and social networks.
faq.q4: Can I use this tool for product pages and blog posts?
faq.a4: Yes. It works well for landing pages, articles, category pages, tools, and product pages.

faq.q1: How do I audit a page for SEO online?
faq.a1: Enter the page URL and the tool will check basic on-page elements such as titles, descriptions, headings, images, and social tags.
faq.q2: What does this SEO audit tool check?
faq.a2: It checks common on-page SEO elements like title tags, meta descriptions, heading structure, alt text, and Open Graph markup.
faq.q3: Is this a full technical SEO crawl?
faq.a3: No. This tool is meant for quick page-level checks rather than a full site crawl.
faq.q4: Can I use it before publishing a page?
faq.a4: Yes. It is useful for reviewing important on-page SEO elements before launch or after an edit.

faq.q1: How do I run an SEO audit for a page?
faq.a1: Enter the page URL and the tool will analyze key on-page elements such as titles, descriptions, headings, alt text, and social tags.
faq.a2: Yes. This tool works well for reviewing public competitor pages and comparing basic on-page SEO signals.
faq.q3: What is the difference between this tool and the quick audit?
faq.a3: This version is designed for deeper page-level checks on public URLs and is better suited for competitive review and detailed inspection.

info.title: Date difference calculator for schedules, deadlines, and events
info.description: Use this date difference calculator to count days between dates, compare date and time values, or run a live countdown to an event. It works well for planning, scheduling, and deadline tracking.

useCases.age: Counting age or time since a specific event
useCases.event: Determining time until an important event

howTo.step1: Select calculation mode (days, date and time, or countdown)
howTo.step2: Enter dates or use quick buttons
howTo.step3: The result will be calculated automatically and show the exact difference

faqList.q1: How do I calculate days between two dates online?
faqList.a1: Choose the start date and end date, and the calculator will automatically show the difference in days, weeks, months, and years.
faqList.q2: Can I use this as a countdown calculator?
faqList.a2: Yes. Switch to countdown mode to see how much time is left until a future date and time.
faqList.q3: Does the calculator account for leap years?
faqList.a3: Yes. The calculation uses calendar-aware date logic, including leap years.
faqList.q4: What is this tool most useful for?
faqList.a4: It is commonly used for planning vacations, tracking deadlines, counting age, and measuring time until important events.
